location: Dropped by defeating the Nox Swordstress & Nox Priest duo boss, in a sealed chamber in the northwest of Sellia, Town of Sorcery, eastern Caelid.
tactics: Light the rooftop braziers around Sellia, Town of Sorcery to dispel the barrier — specifically the one on the southwest tower reached from near the Sellia Backstreets grace, which opens the fog door to this fight
The Nox Swordstress is a fast dual-curved-sword duelist while the Nox Priest supports from range — isolating and focusing the Priest first stops it from buffing/healing its partner
It's a two-on-one fight in a fairly tight room, so avoid getting pinned between both enemies at once
Fan sources disagree on the second enemy's exact name ('Nox Priest' vs 'Nox Monk') — both refer to the same encounter
lore: Wielded by the swordsmen of the long-buried Eternal City, this shotel's needle-thin blade was cast from the liquid metal of a Silver Tear and hardened through tempering. In battle it can briefly revert to its molten state and lash out in a wide, whip-like sweep.

builds.name: Dexterity build with an AoE skill
builds.why: Nearly pure Dexterity scaling paired with the Flowing Form skill (a wide liquefied sweep) makes it a strong crowd-control option for a Dex build.
